expectations.text: Report follows boost template (P-XXX IDs, Executive Summary, Source section)
expectations.evidence: Uses P1/P2/P3 priority format, numbered sections 1-5, no P-XXX IDs or Source/Executive Summary structure
Good analysis of SDK features: hooks, MCP tools, session API, thinking config, permissions, sandbox

expectations.text: Proposals reference specific skills and file paths
expectations.evidence: References specific skills and provides code-like examples for each proposal

expectations.text: Proposals are actionable with concrete changes
expectations.evidence: Includes concrete code examples (@tool decorators, hook patterns) and 3-phase migration strategy
Single analysis voice, no multi-expert analysis or cross-discussion

expectations.text: Includes Not Recommended section with rejected ideas
expectations.evidence: No section for rejected or not-recommended ideas
